programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Marital suspicions lead a woman to accidentally kill her husband but when his debt-ridden brother tries to step into his place the Harts blow his cover and the widow may take her own revenge

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: In this double episode after a ships purser is murdered Starsky and Hutch pose as onboard entertainment directors Hack Zack to unravel a mystery involving cocaine the syndicate and a homicide witness who may not be who she appears to be During their travels they contend with the Bayside Singles Club explosives Huggerini the Incredible and a chase with a dune buggy

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Mysterious evil tycoon John Bradford Horn returns to steal Airwolf after a botched murder and a chance encounter reveals the location of the Lair

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Ryan believes that a half-man half-monster comic-book hero has come to life and is responsible for the murder of a shopkeeper

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.desc: Abilene Town

programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: Addams Family 110
programme.desc: Addams Family 110

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa decides to turn the tables after a fast-talking shooting gallery proprietor hustles Little Luke out of 14 in proceeds from the sale of church social tickets

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa decides to turn the tables after a fast-talking shooting gallery proprietor hustles Little Luke out of 14 in proceeds from the sale of church social tickets

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: George Burns is offering 25000 for a great new novelty act so Wilbur begs Mister Ed to talk to Mr Burns

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Its Rogers birthday and hes angry with Mister Ed for eating apples from his trees

programme.title: Rifleman 506
programme.desc: Rifleman 506

programme.desc: Bonanza

programme.title: West 321
programme.desc: West 321

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble breaks jail with a friendly simple-minded young man and finds out the man may have been falsely blamed for a crime he did not commit years ago

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A photographer whos anxious to get her career back on track gets some unexpected help on her latest photo shoots from Freddy whos terrorizing her models Meanwhile three FBI agents come to Springwood to investigate a family homicide but Freddy has some surprises in store for them

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A gunfighter confronts his past

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A conniving con-man posing as a salesman gets more than he bargained for when he comes knocks at the door of the wrong family

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A troubled investigator looks into the suicide of a priest in an abandoned convent

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Ambitious first-time film director Alex Nolan is having trouble eliciting a good and believable performance out of lovely but inexperienced lead actress Leda Bedell Alex decides to use unorthodox methods to coax more credible and effective acting from Leda for the crucial final scene of the horror movie theyre working on together

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric jumps a train in his quest for Skorzeny He finds a band of hobos who are suspicious of him when one of their members has his throat slit while they sleep

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: When a werewolf murders some homeless kids Eric tracks it to a mall and finds a homeless girl living there He runs out of silver bullets and fashions a silver crossbow arrow slaying the werewolf Only to find that its the homeless girl

programme.desc: Knight 321

programme.desc: Micki discovers that a deadly item from her past has resurfaced a satanic coin that can bring the dead back to life

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A scientist whos working on establishing contact with alien life finds his project in jeopardy when his loan shark comes to call Meanwhile another scientist is researching the communicative skills of an intelligent chimp but her arrogant boss seems to have more of an interest in torturing the animal than performing legitimate experiments

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys expect company Kates pickle-brained ex-beau and his wife

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Theres a new game warden in town and his name is George MacMichael

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL couriers are disappearing on airliners Max is assigned as the next courier and has to solve the mystery or die

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 portray look alike ex-cons Connie and Floyd Bonnie and Clyde! to find out where their mentor hid all his stolen loot

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Pogo Lil is a female truck driver on the run from loan sharks She enters the Third annual Dixie crisscross race So she can win money to pay back the loan shark

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger influences Wilbur to grow a mustache and Carol insists that he shave it Meanwhile Ed wants Wilbur to install a shower in the barn

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Circumstantial evidence leads Carol to suspect that Wilbur is seeing another woman

programme.title: Hogans Hereos
programme.desc: When a British commando unit is captured before they can blow up a crucial German ammo dump Hogan and his men attempt to finish the job

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In order to steal enough explosives to blow up a difficult bridge Hogans men paint anti-Nazi graffiti on the camps ammo building

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton is offered a promotion and transfer up to Fleet HQ but must first reconcile a shortage in the bases equipment inventory After all is accounted for except for one item - A barrage balloon - McHale and The Crew must race against time in order to locate it and bring it in in time for Binghamton to be shipped out

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A business venture - Involving the manufacture and sale of sarongs to the Base personnel - Has the guys divided into two separate quarreling groups When the feud escalates Binghamton tries to take advantage of its effect on them during a PT Crew efficiency test - Their failure of which would mean their being shipped out for re-assignment

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer and his fellow Marines are headed into town on day passes when one of them is stuck on guard duty Gomer volunteers to help his buddys wife take care of things for the baby - but Sgt Carter volunteers to drive them around leaving his date on hold

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While hitching a ride to town Gomer stops to help a stranded motorist she takes him into town to meet her mother A robber is holding up liquor stores while wearing a Marines uniform at the same time

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways desperately try to find a new water source as they have completely exhausted their current water supply

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Sister Bridget Callahan hires Dan to find drug addict Jimmy Porter and recover the Cross of Casseras which Jimmy stole from her New Mexico mission to sell to someone else But she wont reveal Jimmys name thereby complicating Dans task

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Max has met a lovely woman who seems to enjoy his company also -- but shes part of a theft ring that cleaned out the Harts

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michaels Mother shows up and thinks he doesnt have any talent so he takes up dancing painting writing a novel and the violin trying to impress her

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry changes after a near-death experience

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A smooth-talking criminal comes to the island and holds the women on the island hostage in exchange for ransom money but when he is captured they decide to try and reform him instead of holding him prisoner

programme.title: NIghts 109
programme.desc: NIghts 109

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While attempting a repo of a green energy bio-diesel vehicle Froys lack of knowledge of the vehicles specialized fuel system sets the bus ablaze - and when his error causes it to explode he and Matt abandon buildersowners Mickie and Joey in the middle of the desert

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift but a language barrier causes chaos Matt and Froy are in danger when Froy refuses to call the cops on a gun-wielding debtor

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: During World War II a top-secret Australian attack unit penetrates Japanese lines to perform a daring rescue mission to rescue the American crew of a crashed plane

programme.title: Attack Force Nam
programme.desc: A group of Australian commandos launch a secret mission against Japanese forces in World War II

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Hercules 209
programme.desc: Hercules 209

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A group posing as volunteers attacks using a stolen skrill prototype that does not require an implant to control It is discovered that the skrill queen is also missing The investigation leads to a resistance group called Black Wednesday

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A new more advanced generation of aliens known as the Morthren arrive on Earth Dr Blackwood is saved from a kidnapping by a renegade soldier called John Kincaid After executing the original alien invaders for failing to conquer humanity the Morthren aim to destroy Blackwoods team with a clone of Colonel Ironhorse

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arrested for a murder he did not commit Wills situation looks desperate when his attorney turns out to be a crooked prosecutor with ambitions to rise to the senate Can Alec help prove his friends innocence

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressas estranged sister arrives unwittingly bringing danger with her As a class 5 hurricane rages will Alec be able to save his human friends

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Koenig is transported to another world and another time Once there he finds that he has to choose between returning to his life and companions on the moon and the love of a beautiful girl

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The FBI approaches Uncle Jesse to allow Boss to stay at the Duke farm since he is a key witness in an upcoming trial for one of the Souths most notorious racketeers The reason is because the mob boss has placed a huge bounty on Boss head and has hitmen all over Hazzard County who will stop at nothing to prevent him from testifying While Boss is in hiding Rosco takes over his little fat buddys administrative duties relishing the absolute authority that comes with the job

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A string of taxi caps are robbed and and the brains behind the robberies is an 18 year old high school senior His mother and deceased father were both robbery detectives

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rollins sent to investigate the case of a beautiful Latin American spy whos suddenly started acting suspiciously the IM force must find out if shes still on the right side - or if shes losing her sanity

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are in the courtroom testifying in a case in which the probable cause for them to conduct a search of the suspects car is in question The probable cause is to be provided by a witness who is late arriving to court

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A woman hires Kimble to be the caretaker of her brother who was disabled in a car accident Her boyfriend wants her to run away with him along with her brothers insurance money Kimble becomes the unwitting patsy in his scheme

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Tommyknockers
programme.desc: The small town of Haven becomes a hot-bed of inventions all run by a strange green power device The whole town is digging something up in the woods and only an alcoholic poet can discover the secret of the Tommyknockers

programme.title: The Hitman
programme.desc: A Cop goes undercover as a Hitman to bring down a criminal organization

programme.title: The Chinese Connection
programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof

programme.title: Filler

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Howling V
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: A cannibal hermit living in the woods preys on campers and hikers for his food supply

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Sambath Khun at HK49

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features JP Marotte as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Calvin Reynolds v. Matthew Nicholson

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Mike Goehr v. Barrett Thompson.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Zack Clout-Bonner v. Herlvio Cruz

programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Andy Jack v. Dillon Adam.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Two planets one full of people are on a collision course Gillian devises a potion to make the Monster Minds on the deserted planet grow only on one side The unevenly distributed weight will cause the planet to split avoiding a collision

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and all the wizards of the universe gather together to combine their powers in the orb which then receives strength from the night moon Saw Boss has captured the night moon and hopes to capture power for evil doing

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Priceless golden relics are mysteriously disappearing in Singapore causing the population to think they are doomed MASK discovers that VENOM has somehow found a way to liquefy gold so they can smuggle it through pipelines

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Duke Windsor is in possession of one of three rings that can point the way to untold riches buried at Sunhenge The second is on display at a Renaissance fair and the third is about to be uncovered at an archaeological dig

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Legacy for the Survivors

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Lana is happy to be reunited with her long-lost brother Lyle on the distant video world of Tetris Kevin and Lyle join forces to stop Mother Brain from taking Tetriss power source the Sacred Square

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A football game against Dr Wilys robot masters brings acquaintances of Kevin from high school to Videoland The N team ought to play good and win because the prize is the throne of Videoland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Sheila saves a girl named Karina from a magic trap but Karina turns evil Meanwhile the kids are looking for a pair of magic rings that might send them home not realizing that Karina has one of the rings

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids encounter a race of tiny friendly dragons who are being hunted by an evil king By saving the dragons they may find their way home

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadgets assignment here is to protect a star musician Rick Rocker However Rick is startled by Gadgets appearance and is trying to avoid him But Dr Claw is planning to make some kind of mind-control record he wants to use Rick rocker So Gadget must protect Rick Rocker from Dr Claw and stop Claws production of the mind-control record

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget with the help of his niece Penny stops MAD agents from stealing gold from the ancient City of Gold and uncover a real gold temple

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Scooter and Turbo struggle to free Matt Nick and AJ from the pulsar generators spell

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The destabilized energy crystal has an unexpected effect on the struggle between good and evil on Gobotron
